SELECT year1, year2 FROM (SELECT toISOYear(toDate('2024/10/02')) as year1, toISOYear(toDateTime('2024-10-02 01:30:00')) as year2);
SELECT d, toISOYear(d) FROM test_dates WHERE toISOYear(d) = 2024;
CREATE TABLE test_dates2 (d DateTime, description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates2 VALUES (toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00'), 'New Year'), (toDateTime('2024-12-31 23:59:59'), 'New Year Eve');
SELECT t1.description, toISOYear(t1.d) FROM test_dates2 t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON toISOYear(t1.d) = toISOYear(t2.d);
SELECT DISTINCT toISOYear(d) FROM (SELECT d FROM test_dates UNION SELECT toDateTime('2024-05-05 10:20:30'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE toISOYear(d) >= 2024;
SELECT AVG(toISOYear(d)) FROM test_dates GROUP BY toISOYear(d);
